Cuba says it shot dead four people on US-registered speedboatThe passengers were Cuban nationals living in the US and intended to "carry out an infiltration for terrorist purposes", the Cuban government says. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c24drvj8yl2o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c24drvj8yl2o#0 Thu, 26 Feb 2026 08:16:40 GMT
This coastal idyll banned 'harmful' holiday lets. Eight years on, has it worked?A ban on new holiday homes sees more permanent residents but some say the policy harms tourism. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cy59gznnz0zo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cy59gznnz0zo#0 Thu, 26 Feb 2026 01:18:20 GMT
